aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and some service-related content. However, it lacks depth in content, user engagement, and local SEO signals.
quick_wins: Add more detailed service pages with location-specific keywords.
Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews.
Optimize meta titles and descriptions with relevant keywords.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and complete business information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not fully optimized. It needs more reviews, photos, and detailed business information to improve local search visibility.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on the website but lacks citations on major local directories.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories like Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms.
Encourage local partnerships and sponsorships that include NAP mentions.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema for the FAQ section.
No LocalBusiness schema with detailed business hours and services.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of user-generated content and reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Portland, Oregon.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement a review generation strategy and optimize existing content with local keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish high-quality, informative blog posts about HVAC topics to establish the business as an authority in the field.

business_name: Magic Mike's Heating and Cooling inc.
page_title: Top AC Company Services | MagicMikesHeating - Call Now for Expert HVAC Solutions
